deferred_edge_classes.blocked_on: no Lean-aware proof-graph builder exists yet; see owner_path
deferred_edge_classes.missing: theorem -> lemma -> tactic edges inside a proof organ
deferred_edge_classes.would_come_from: a Lean-aware proof-graph builder feeding this join index

edge_semantics.proven_by: the authority receipt that last established the bounded claim within its ceiling; not domain-truth proof
edge_semantics.routes_to: a task-class entry point whose fan-out includes the organ; navigation, not execution order

claim.claim_ceiling: validates only the declared public pattern-binding and route-readiness contract over public fixtures, substrate bundle structure, pattern-ledger row refs, binding sidecars, authority handles, and negative cases; does not certify the private pattern ledger, hosted-public readiness, release, publication, provider calls, private-data equivalence, whole-system correctness, or promote mined pattern rows into standalone public leaves

claim.claim_ceiling: validates declared public contract only

claim.claim_ceiling: projection mechanics only, not domain correctness

claim.claim_ceiling: projection mechanics only, not domain correctness
